_description: Intent-based product substitution map. Defines what can substitute for what, what must never be substituted, and category boundaries.

protein_for_cooking.substitution_logic: Match by tags when possible. Suggest within same tag family (e.g., fish→fish, red_meat→red_meat) first, then broader.
anti_substitutions: Never substitute red meat for someone who specified vegetarian/vegan
Never substitute fish for red meat without asking (allergy risk)
Never substitute tofu if user asked specifically for meat
Never substitute kuzu (lamb) for dana (beef) in recipes -- flavor profile is different

cooking_fats.substitution_logic: Match by cooking method tag. High heat→high heat, salad→salad.
anti_substitutions: Never substitute margarin for tereyağı in baking without noting difference
Never substitute sızma zeytinyağı for frying (smoke point too low)
Never substitute any oil for tereyağı in Turkish breakfast context
Never substitute Türk kahvesi with filtre kahve -- completely different preparation and culture
Never substitute çay with kahve without asking -- fundamentally different daily habits
Never suggest Nescafe as substitute for specialty coffee

hot_beverage_machines.substitution_logic: Match by beverage type. Only suggest within same beverage family.
anti_substitutions: Never substitute çay makinesi with kettle -- çay makinesi has double pot (çaydanlık) system
Never substitute espresso machine with filtre kahve makinesi
Never substitute elektrikli cezve with any other coffee machine -- unique brewing method

seating.substitution_logic: Only substitute within same room/use context.
anti_substitutions: Never substitute dining chair for office/desk use -- ergonomics differ significantly
Never substitute gaming chair when user needs ergonomic office chair for health reasons
Never substitute kanepe for tekli koltuk -- space requirements differ

storage_furniture.substitution_logic: Match by room and stored item type.
anti_substitutions: Never substitute bathroom storage for kitchen storage or vice versa
Never substitute gardırop with şifonyer -- different form factor and capacity
Never substitute purpose-specific storage across rooms

substitution_boundaries._description: Hard boundaries that should never be crossed regardless of context.
rules: Food items never substitute for non-food items and vice versa
Electrical appliances never substitute for manual tools without explicit user consent
Adult products never substitute for children's products
Prescription/medical items never have substitutions suggested
Different voltage/plug standard items are not substitutes without adapter mention
Gas appliances and electric appliances are not substitutes without verifying infrastructure
Built-in appliances and freestanding appliances are not direct substitutes (installation differs)
